recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: In a Heartbeat
recommendations.overview: A closeted boy runs the risk of being outed by his own heart after it pops out of his chest to chase down the boy of his dreams.

recommendations.title: Beautiful Thing
recommendations.overview: During a long, hot summer on the Thamesmead Estate in Southeast London, three teenagers edge towards adulthood.

recommendations.title: F*ck Love Too
recommendations.overview: In this romantic comedy, several friends, each dealing with unhappy love lives, turn to each other for help - but not always with the best results.
recommendations.director: Aram van de Rest, Appie Boudellah

recommendations.title: No Strings Attached
recommendations.overview: Emma is a busy doctor who sets up a seemingly perfect arrangement when she offers her best friend Adam a relationship with one rule: No strings attached. But when a fling becomes a thing, can sex friends stay best friends?

recommendations.title: Maybe Baby
recommendations.overview: Sam and Lucie Bell are a married couple who seem to have it all: good looks, successful careers, matching motorbikes, and an enthusiastic love life. The only thing they lack is the one thing they want more—a baby.

recommendations.title: Love Is Overrated
recommendations.overview: Diagnosed «crap with girls» by his friends, Anis’ love life has barely a pulse. Three years after the loss of Isma, his best friend and mentor, Anis takes his courage in both hands and decides finally to get out and meet people again. And the person

recommendations.title: Jungle Beat: The Movie
recommendations.overview: The Jungle Beat animals think it’s the best thing ever when an alien arrives in the jungle bringing with him the power of speech. They also surprisingly think it’s the best thing ever when they find out that he’s been sent to conquer them.

recommendations.title: Logorama
recommendations.overview: Two cops portrayed by Michelin Men chase an armed Ronald McDonald through the streets of a fictionalized, stylized city.
recommendations.director: Ludovic Houplain, François Alaux, Hervé de Crécy

recommendations.title: Catch and Release
recommendations.overview: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.
